what_input_feature: A structurally coherent ELF input whose program/section-header offset and size fields (vmaddr/vmsize at the dword-aligned header slots, e.g. bytes around 0x10-0x27) decode to a vm range that is NOT covered by translator_->vm_map, driving the !CoversRange(vmaddr, vmsize) TRUE side at bloaty.cc:1331.
why_winner_satisfies: Winner cmplog seeds carry a valid ELF magic plus structured 4-byte header values (e.g. 00 00 00 10 / 00 00 00 10 at 0x20-0x27, 50 55 markers at 0x18-0x19) so AddRange is invoked with concrete vmaddr/vmsize that I2S has tuned to land outside the base map, hitting the THROW true side 26 times.
why_loser_doesnt: Naive loser seeds fill the header region with padding (long runs of 0x20 spaces and 0x00) rather than the precise dword values that decode to an out-of-range vm range; they reach line 1331 only on the FALSE side (L1331 T=0 F=550000) and never satisfy the TRUE condition.
mechanism_attribution: cmplog's I2SRandReplace reads the post-execution CmpLogObserver buffer for the CoversRange / range-comparison CMP operands and substitutes the parsed comparand back into the matching input header offsets, letting cmplog land precise vmaddr/vmsize values that naive's blind havoc byte mutation cannot synthesize.

The W per-role overlay reaches the cmsSigLabData arm (lines 454-477) that only executes on the false side of the XYZ case.

The InPCS dispatch is a switch over exact 4-byte signature constants; value_profile's distance-bucket feedback gives no smooth path toward an unrelated FOURCC, but I2SRandReplace logs the compared signature constant and splices it directly into the matching input-byte position, planting the exact non-PCS color-space token that drives execution to the default arm.
